anomalies.detail: trend_donchian_sol on breakout_1 (prop) REJECTED 'sizing_failed: balance() returned None for breakout_1 (exchange=breakout): account unreachable' — the API-less prop account can't size off a live balance() call, so that SOL prop ticket never emitted. ETH prop legs DO emit (different path). Prop sizing should use ruleset economics, not balance().

GRADING NOT REFRESHED this session — the order-package scorer needs write access to the live trade_journal.db, unreachable from this sandbox (relay is GET-only /api/diag/*). claudeScore grades are stale; per-trade dossiers carry no fresh grade. Degraded dimension, not fabricated.

Quiet trading — real money 2 small htf_pullback BTC losses (-$1.12), bybit_2 now flat; prop +$18.81 (operator-reported ETH close, documented this session). Two live issues surfaced + actioned: Alpaca positions sitting naked (root-caused + fix in draft PR #5018) and IB gateway down (MES/MGC/MHG dark). ML daily cycle green; 0 of 45 models promotable. Grading not refreshed (sandbox can't write the live DB).
